[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000001110 3
1 011100101 5
2 010010110 4
3 100001011 4
4 010011011 5
5 000010000 1
6 000001110 3
7 011100101 5

01 10 100000100 2
12 21 001010000 2
23 32 011101011 6
34 43 001110011 5
45 54 110011101 6
56 65 011001010 4
67 76 110001111 6
70 07 100010100 3

02 20 101010100 4
13 31 010111011 6
24 42 010011000 3
35 53 111101110 7
46 64 101010111 6
57 75 101000101 4
60 06 010011011 5 match 4
71 17 000010000 1 match 5

14 41 011001000 3
25 52 100000101 3
36 63 100100100 3
47 74 011011000 4
50 05 001010001 3
61 16 110011111 7
72 27 001000000 1

15 51 101010101 5

37 73 010101011 5
